name: Sinigang Na Baboy (Pork in Sour Broth)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Pork riblets or pork ribs, cut into pieces
1 medium Icicle radish, cut into 1-inch pieces (or 10 red radishes)
1/2 lb Spinach (or cabbage, mustard greens, or watercress)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the water and pork to a boil. Add tomatoes, onion, salt, and tamarind. Simmer for 1 hour or until the pork is tender.
2. Optional: Remove the tamarind and mash it with some broth. Strain the juice into the pot.
3. Taste for seasoning. Bring to a boil. Add green beans and radish 10 minutes.
4. Add spinach, cover, and turn off the heat. Let stand for 5 minutes to finish cooking the spinach.
